title: RSL HIGHLY OPTIMIZED
description: RSL HIGHLY MODPACK is a performance-focused modpack designed to maximize Minecraft’s efficiency. It contains only performance-enhancing mods that prioritize faster loading times, smoother gameplay, and improved FPS, without compromising on speed or system
body:
RSL HIGHLY OPTIMIZED is a Minecraft modpack focused entirely on performance enhancement. It includes carefully selected optimization mods such as Sodium, Lithium, Starlight, and other lightweight tools designed to improve FPS, reduce stuttering, and speed up game loading.

This modpack does not include any visual or gameplay changes — it's built specifically for players who want a smoother experience on both low-end and high-end PCs. Whether you're playing survival or building in creative mode, RSL HIGHLY OPTIMIZED helps Minecraft run more efficiently.
